benefits.description: Eliminated early waking (3-4:30am) and achieved 8 hours of continuous sleep through 7:30am when dosed at 5pm with 100mcg

side_effects.description: Light sweating at night when dosed at 7pm; too stimulating
Couldn't sleep at designated time (too awake at 11pm) and early waking returned with higher doses (200mcg) and later dosing (6:30pm)

protocol_notes: 49F. Also taking melatonin 0.3-1mg and L-Theanine 200mg as part of sleep stack. Found Epitalon optimal at 100mcg dosed no later than 5pm. Originally developed sleep issues after starting Retatrutide due to glucagon receptor activation. Plan is 2-3 months on Epitalon with 5 days on/2 days off cycle, then 1 month break before restarting. Has been using melatonin for years at low doses to avoid rebound effect. Sleeping through 8+ hours straight with no bathroom waking.
